sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57644" key="klagga/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλαγγ-άζω</orth>, onomatop. word for the cry of cranes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.89</biblScope> </bibl>: hence, of the language of the Scythians, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
